fields.name: image
fields.label: Vehicle Image
fields.description: Image of the vehicle displayed alongside the form

fields.name: eyebrow
fields.label: Eyebrow Text
fields.description: Small uppercase label shown above the headline (e.g. 'Experience the drive')

fields.name: headline
fields.label: Headline
fields.description: Large heading shown next to the vehicle image

fields.name: subtext
fields.label: Subtext
fields.description: Supporting text shown below the headline

fields.name: car-models
fields.label: Car Models (comma-separated)
fields.value: Carvelo Sedan, Carvelo SUV, Carvelo Luxury, Carvelo Electric
fields.description: Comma-separated list of car models to show in the dropdown

fields.name: success-message
fields.label: Success Message
fields.value: Thank you! Your test drive has been booked. We will contact you shortly to confirm your appointment.

fields.name: redirect-url
fields.label: Redirect URL (after submit)
fields.description: Optional page to redirect to 2 seconds after a successful submission

fields.name: buttondata
fields.label: Button Data
fields.description: Comma-separated key,value pairs for data layer

fields.name: custom-class
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Space-separated CSS class names to add to the block
